creator: danfe@regency.nsu.ru
text:
I hereby ask to perform the following repository copies (in ports/x11):

	nvidia-driver-71xx -> nvidia-driver-71
	nvidia-driver-96xx -> nvidia-driver-96

"xx" suffix is redundant and decreases readability.  It will also put
these two in line with nvidia-driver-173 which was recently added, and
possible new ones.  Thanks.
